description: A square designed 'LABOR NEWS' announcement card in DOL's branded template. The background photo is a warm close-up of hands -- a caregiver in blue clothing clasping/holding the hands of an older person, evoking home health / companion care. Overlaid is a small navy tab with white italic caps 'LABOR NEWS' and a multi-line bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'Department of Labor recovers $844K in back wages, damages for 158 workers illegally deprived of overtime wages by Louisiana home care providers.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.' This is a designed enforcement-announcement graphic (not a candid photo) publicizing a Wage and Hour Division recovery against home-care employers who misclassified workers as independent contractors. Messaging technique: branded news-promo card portraying the agency as recovering stolen wages for vulnerable care workers; audience is general public, workers, employers. Posted Jan 17 2025, just before the Jan 20 inauguration, using the recurring DOL design template.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Department of Labor recovers $844K in back wages, damages for 158 workers illegally deprived of overtime wages by Louisiana home care providers / dol.gov/newsroom
